name: TestWaitForMostNetState
title: TestWaitForMostNetState
syntax: long TestWaitForMostNetState(long aOldState, long aNewState, unsigned long aTimeout);
description: The function waits until the expiration of the time aTimeout for a transfer of the MOST NetState from the state aOldState into the state aNewState.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
